_comment_openai_api_key: Loaded from OPENAI_API_KEY in the environment or .env file.
_comment_openai_model: Model name used by every OpenAI component.
_comment_use_openai_scene_provider: Use OpenAI for scene narration when runtime_mode is mixed.
_comment_use_openai_dialogue_intent_adap: Use OpenAI for dialogue intent interpretation when runtime_mode is mixed.
_comment_use_openai_dialogue_renderer: Use OpenAI for NPC dialogue realization when runtime_mode is mixed.
_comment_use_openai_storyteller_mode: Legacy compatibility knob for the full OpenAI storyteller preset.
